# assistant-text

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders assistant text events in the JSONL viewer, with optional markdown rendering.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `JsonlViewer.EventRenderer` "assistant-text" → `AssistantTextRow`, `JsonlViewer.RowAction` "stop-reason" → `StopReasonAction`, `JsonlViewer.RowAction` "markdown-toggle" → `MarkdownToggleAction`, `JsonlViewer.RowAction` "copy-assistant-text" → `CopyAssistantTextAction`
  - Uses: `active-data.ActiveDataIdentityProvider`, `active-data.useActiveDataSegments`, `conversations/conversation-view.conversationPane`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.CopyTextAction`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.JsonlViewer`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.RowActionButton`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.RowActions`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer.useRowMarkdown`, `primitives/css/pin.Pin`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/markdown.Markdown`, `primitives/select-scope.ContentScope`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
